name: Patient Registration Agent
firstMessage: Hi there, thanks for calling! This is Alex, the intake coordinator — are you calling to register as a new patient today?
tools: see tools.json — import/attach these three functions in the Vapi dashboard
notes: language set to 'multi' on the transcriber + explicit Spanish-switch instruction in the system prompt covers the bonus multi-language requirement. recordingEnabled + serverUrl end-of-call-report handler covers the bonus call transcript requirement (logged server-side).
